# BJUFILA Cleaning & Dishwashing Services LLC

> Locally owned commercial cleaning, janitorial, and dishwashing company serving the greater Orlando, Florida metro. BJUFILA cleans offices, restaurants, medical facilities, retail spaces, and more — with bonded, insured, background-checked crews, green-certified products, and photo-verified quality on every visit.

## Contact
- Phone: (407) 286-0078
- Email: sales@bjufilacds.com
- Service area: Orlando, Winter Park, Kissimmee, Lake Nona, Altamonte Springs, Maitland, Sanford, Downtown Orlando
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM
- Website: https://bjufilacds.com

## Services
- [Office & Corporate Cleaning](https://bjufilacds.com/services/office-commercial-cleaning): Daily/nightly janitorial programs for Orlando offices and coworking spaces.
- [Restaurant, Kitchen & Dishwashing](https://bjufilacds.com/services/restaurant-kitchen-dishwashing): Commercial dishwashing, kitchen degreasing, and dining-room detailing to stay health-inspection ready.
- [Medical & Healthcare Cleaning](https://bjufilacds.com/services/medical-healthcare-cleaning): Hospital-grade disinfection for clinics, dental, urgent care, and labs.
- [Retail & Commercial Spaces](https://bjufilacds.com/services/retail-commercial-spaces): Show-floor-ready cleaning for stores, showrooms, salons, and studios.
- [Floor Care & Deep Cleaning](https://bjufilacds.com/services/floor-care-deep-cleaning): Strip & wax, tile & grout, carpet extraction, and polishing.
- [Post-Construction Cleaning](https://bjufilacds.com/services/post-construction-cleaning): Fine-dust removal and finish cleaning for new builds and renovations.

## Why BJUFILA
- Bonded, insured, and background-checked crews
- Transparent flat monthly pricing — no hidden fees
- After-hours and flexible scheduling
- EPA-approved, green-certified products
- One dedicated account contact (no call centers)
- Photo-verified quality checklists after every visit
